title: Rye
content:
Roof Restoration Rye

Experience Our Quality Roof Repairs For Residents In Rye. Are you looking for expert roof repairs or restorations in the Rye? How about gutter repairs and installations to get you through the winter months? The qualified roof tilers and roof repairers at Sandhurst Roofing are the team for you.

Sandhurst Roofing has been a family owned and operated business for over 30 years, and are proudly delivering great value, exceptional service and quality work to the people of Melbourne – even after all these years.

Get a Quote!

Fully Licensed & Insured Roof & Gutter Repairs

We have proven experience in working with a range of products and materials to complete the roofing tasks at hand. Our qualified tradespeople specialise in dealing with terracotta tiles, flat metal roofing, cement tiles, and Colorbond roofing, with all these services can be delivered at your Rye home. We stand behind every product that we use, that's why we offer a 10-year guarantee on our workmanship and materials. Not only that, but our tradespeople will take the time to explain the process and answer any questions you may have so you understand the work that is being done to your home.

We provide a fully licensed and insured service when it comes to our gutter repairs, roof repairs, and roof restorations in Rye. Whether you require COLORBOND® steel roofing services or cement tile repairs, you can count on the Sandhurst Roofing team. No matter where you live our team of experts are at your disposal. Give us a call today to discuss your specific roofing needs or to ask advice.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Rye

At Sandhurst Roofing we understand that maintenance, repair and replacement of your gutters is a crucial part of keeping your roof in good condition. Gutters direct water away from the roof, preventing mould growth, rotting, leaks etc. from ruining the look and structural stability of our roof.

Gutters are one of the most important parts of your roof; that is why we use Colorbond Steel, the most durable and reliable product available to us. COLORBOND® steel is not only incredibly durable, and built for all different types of climates, but it is also extremely versatile and has a colour to suit your existing property. For more information on our comprehensive roofing and guttering service, call us today on 0448 812 800.

What Our Customers Say

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Contact the Rye Roofing Specialists Today

Are you ready to restore or repair your home? Call Steve on 0448 812 800 for a friendly chat and a competitive quote. You can also email us at info@sandhurstroofing.com.au and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

We offer our roofing services to people living in Rye but also to surrounding suburbs like: Main Ridge, Arthurs Seat, Cape Schanck, St Andrews Beach and Red Hill South.

Get a Quote!
